data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding Q&A and poll response linkage.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the linkage between Q&A and poll responses to attendees/sessions. However, the prior evidence does not provide any concrete information or mechanisms related to capturing live engagement events such as Q&A or polls. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
gaps: No evidence of live engagement event capture mechanisms such as Q&A or polls.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
